n1.text: You stand at the edge of a dark forest. The trees loom overhead, their branches tangled like grasping fingers. A narrow path winds into the shadows ahead.

options.text: Follow the path into the forest

n2.text: You venture deeper into the forest. The path winds between ancient oaks. Soon you hear the sound of running water nearby.

n3.text: You return to the safety of town. The innkeeper gives you a warm meal and a soft bed for the night. Perhaps tomorrow you will be braver.

n4.text: You find a crystal-clear stream. An old woman sits beside it, holding a small glowing vial. She smiles and offers it to you.

n5.text: The path opens into a clearing. An ancient stone tower stands before you, its door slightly ajar. Ivy crawls up its walls.

n6.text: The liquid tastes of starlight and pine. Warmth floods through you. The old woman smiles — you have been blessed with good fortune on your journey.

n7.text: Inside the tower, centuries of forgotten knowledge await. You spend years here, mastering ancient arts. Your adventure... is only just beginning.
